name: Chicken & Tomato Greek Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 can Chunk white chicken, well-drained (10 oz)
10 S&W Extra Large Black Olives, pitted
1/4 cup S&W Vintage Lites White Wine
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine chicken, tomatoes, cucumber, zucchini, onion, garlic, olives, and cheese in a large bowl.
2. Add dressing and toss well.
3. Serve on lettuce leaves.
